stdout:
**Findings**
No blocking findings.

**Acceptance Criteria**
REQ-01 through REQ-06 are satisfied. Apply no longer creates a dangling plan doc reference, and planning descriptions carry the author/link instruction at [.jit/templates.toml](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.jit/templates.toml:21). Template apply creates nodes and gates without adding a `DocumentReference` at [template.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/template.rs:581), with regression coverage at [template_apply_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/template_apply_tests.rs:138).

Missing external plans are skipped only before the planning node is `done`, and other read errors still propagate at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:518). Coverage preview is now state-gated in active, SDD, and research rules at [.jit/rules.toml](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.jit/rules.toml:54), [docs/examples/sdd/rules.toml](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/docs/examples/sdd/rules.toml:243), and [docs/examples/research/rules.toml](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/docs/examples/research/rules.toml:274). `plan-review` now explicitly requires the plan to exist at the instructed path and be linked at [scripts/plan-review-prompt.md](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/scripts/plan-review-prompt.md:19).

**Prior Review Feedback**
The previous blocker was the ungated research example selector. It is resolved: [docs/examples/research/rules.toml](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/docs/examples/research/rules.toml:274) now uses `state = ["in_progress", "gated", "done"]`, and [research_bracket_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/research_bracket_tests.rs:261) covers silence while the breakdown node is backlog.

**Architecture And Boundaries**
No boundary violation found. File reads for external plan content stay in command-boundary code via `resolve_plan_content`, while graph evaluation receives injected content at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:403). Template apply remains command orchestration over storage/domain and does not mix CLI/output concerns.

**Correctness And Invariants**
No unsafe code, PID handling, assignee/label-format, or gate-transition regressions found in the touched paths. Force refresh updates descriptions through storage and appends an event at [template.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/template.rs:814).

**Testing And Lint**
`./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed. I also ran:
`cargo test -p jit --test template_apply_tests --test scope_validation_tests --test sdd_bracket_tests --test research_bracket_tests` passed: 55 tests.
`cargo clippy -p jit --all-targets -- -D warnings` passed.

**Jit Issue Management**
The issue has no dependencies, so there is no prerequisite work to verify. Repository validation passed; label warnings were not present.

**Documentation**
Public API documentation touched in `validate.rs` and `plan_doc.rs` includes examples. Shipped config/docs now describe the lifecycle-gated coverage-preview behavior consistently.

VERDICT: PASS
---
Gate result: PASSED
